description:
FFmpeg Batch AV Converter is a free universal audio and video encoder.

FFmpeg Batch AV Converter is a free universal audio and video encoder, that allows to use the full potential of ffmpeg command line with a few mouse clicks in a convenient GUI with drag and drop, progress information.
� Tested with ffmpeg.exe 8.1.1
� Added basic support for bluray protocol (Drag and drop drive, or Main File and context menu). (Input chapters not natively supported by ffmpeg).
� Browser cookies selector used by Get YouTube streams button, to enable Premium streams selection.
� Quick startup enabled by default, due to memory usage (some controls may display different, disable it to get back to default style).
